name: Quest Parker
tagline: AI Consultant · Data Scientist · Deployment Strategist · Forward Deployed Engineer
bio_short: I build AI systems that generate measurable business impact — from LLM-powered document analysis to ML clustering models that surface millions in hidden costs.
bio_long: Quest Parker sits at the intersection of AI engineering and enterprise consulting. With a background spanning software engineering, machine learning, and forward-deployed client engagements, I specialize in taking AI from proof-of-concept to production. Currently at Celonis as a Value Engineer and Applied AI Champion, I lead foundational analytics initiatives and AI hackathons at national scale. My work spans LLM applications, NLP clustering, process mining, and backend systems — always anchored to real business outcomes. Pursuing an MS in Computer Science (AI focus) at CU Boulder while applying that knowledge daily in the field.

roles.label: AI Consultant
roles.description: Designing and deploying LLM-powered solutions for enterprise clients — from prompt engineering to full RAG pipelines

roles.label: Data Scientist
roles.description: Building ML models and data pipelines across healthcare, supply chain, legal, and automotive sectors

roles.label: Deployment Strategist
roles.description: Owning end-to-end proof-of-value cycles — from discovery workshops to production launches that stick

roles.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
roles.description: Embedding with clients to build custom technical solutions against live enterprise data, on-site and at pace
